subject: [UUI-SERVER] Modify field name and fix postgresql error
commit_message:
[UUI-SERVER] Modify field name and fix postgresql error

1. In UUI-Server, modify sliceProfile field name.
2. In UUI-Server, fix "no transaction is in progress" error.

Issue-ID: USECASEUI-524
Change-Id: Ic3670bdd65e46629a8d215effd67e3912fce2619
Signed-off-by: hekeguang <hekeguang@chinamobile.com>

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/160/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/160/ )
